description.1: Hi, I'm Lars — a full-stack web developer based near Heilbronn, Germany. I started my journey in web development back in 2017 and quickly developed a deep passion for crafting complete, functional applications that optimize processes and genuinely the end user.
description.2: Currently, I work at {company}, where I am a proud core team member of {onyx} — an Open Source design system built natively for the Vue.js ecosystem. Prior to this, I honed my skills over several years working in an advertising agency and taking on various challenges as a freelancer.
description.3: When I'm off the clock, I am a dedicated technic enthusiast. I love spending my spare time diving into new tech trends or programming fun and useful personal projects to keep growing as an engineer.

hero.subtitle: Software Engineer · Web Development
hero.description: I build thoughtful web experiences — from the pixel to the pipeline. Currently crafting tools that make complex ideas feel effortless.
